plugins.name: ultraprompt
plugins.description: Ultraprompt V9.3 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 56 skills, 35 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.3 completes the release-integrity pass: one VERSION file feeds every version site; render-manifest --check fails CI on any version drift; the SubagentStart hook is single-sourced across POSIX and Windows; README and manifest catalog counts render from one template.
